response.name: Informasi Metadata Model ML
response.body:
{
    "algorithm": "RandomForestClassifier",
    "n_estimators": 150,
    "n_features": 10,
    "features": [
        "category_id",
        "has_wifi",
        "has_ac",
        "has_parking",
        "avg_report_score",
        "total_bookmarks",
        "total_reports",
        "hour_of_day",
        "day_of_week",
        "capacity_estimate"
    ],
    "classes": [
        "Ramai",
        "Cukup Tenang",
        "Sangat Tenang"
    ],
    "label_map": {
        "0": "Ramai",
        "1": "Cukup Tenang",
        "2": "Sangat Tenang"
    },
    "category_map": {
        "1": "Perpustakaan",
        "2": "Kafe",
        "3": "Taman",
        "4": "Coworking Space",
        "5": "Kampus",
        "6": "Masjid / Tempat Ibadah"
    },
    "dataset": "quiet_places.csv (1200 baris, synthetic)"
}
